title: hedyotis ceylanica
intro: Hedyotis ceylanica, also known as Ceylon teasel, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis ceylanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Hedyotis ceylanica can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
